title: WEAPONIZED Episodes 22–31 Production Backfill
summary: Added production records for the nine previously missing WEAPONIZED episodes in the #22–#31 range (#22–#27 and #29–#31), while preserving the existing Episode #21 and #28 records. The batch includes executive summaries, key discussion topics, 36 source-grounded principal claims, canonical entity reuse, supporting people and organizations, nine timeline events, official episode and audio references, related-content integration, and updated relationship counts.
